text:
The Hunter × Hunter episodes and chapters are broken into several story arcs (collections of consecutive episodes or chapters that follow a particular storyline within the main plot). There are currently seven official arcs. Exhibition: Togashi Yoshihiro -Puzzle- The following includes the arc names, descriptions of the arcs' plots, and the chapters they span.

Hunter Exam arc

Heavens Arena arc

Yorknew City arc

Greed Island arc

Chimera Ant arc

13th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Succession Contest arc
